summary: Phase 49 testing: Date Field Improvements + Global Read-Only. Verified builder UI shows Required + Read Only checkboxes side-by-side for text, signature, initials fields. Merge field correctly excludes Read Only checkbox. Code review confirms Date Mode dropdown and Alignment buttons are implemented. Signing view code correctly handles readOnly and dateMode properties.

minor.issue: 500 error when PDF URL is unavailable - 'Unable to download PDF from URL'

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 49 implementation is complete and correct based on code review
MultiPageVisualBuilder.js: Required + Read Only checkboxes side-by-side (lines 1192-1220)
MultiPageVisualBuilder.js: Merge field excluded from Read Only checkbox (line 1206)
MultiPageVisualBuilder.js: Date Mode dropdown with auto/manual options (lines 1528-1570)
MultiPageVisualBuilder.js: Date Alignment buttons (left/center/right) with data-testid attributes
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: readOnly handling for all field types (text, date, checkbox, radio, signature, initials)
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Date field handles dateMode='auto' (auto-fill) and dateMode='manual' (date picker)
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Date alignment uses justify-start/center/end classes
useGuidedFillIn.js: Date auto-mode always considered filled, manual-mode requires explicit value
PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js: PDF draw handles date auto-mode (always draw) vs manual-mode (draw only if value present)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 49 features verified via code review and partial UI testing. Builder UI shows Required + Read Only checkboxes correctly. Merge field exclusion verified. Date field properties (Date Mode, Alignment) implemented in code. Signing view readOnly behavior implemented for all field types. Could not fully test drag-and-drop to add new Date field due to UI interaction limitations.
